overall settings.title: Tethered
overall settings.description:
How did a pure spirit come to be bound to the earthly plane?

Quest-driven story like *Bacon for Dinner* set in {#b3a25d|d}{#af9d6e|e}{#aa997f|e}{#a69491|p} {#a28fa2|m}{#9d8ab3|y}{#9985c4|t}{#9581d5|h}{#907ce7|o}{#8c77f8|l}{#a38cfb|o}{#ba9fff|g}{#d1b3ff|y}.

attribs.name: Bound
attribs.description: For example, hands tied. Limits movement or other actions.

attribs.name: Cha
attribs.description: Charisma helps in persuasion or negotiating prices.

attribs.name: Wil
attribs.description: Emotional and mental fortitude, comparable to Con or Str.

items.name: Beast Melee
items.description: Teeth or claws are the preferred weapons for beasts.

items.name: Chain Mail
items.description: Requires high strength to wear and still be able to move freely.

items.name: Charcoal
items.description: Made from wood, needed to fuel forges.

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1a
items.description:
Lyria swims down to the library floor, the fin flaps raised up on her arms and legs. Amidst the bookshelves, there sits an ancient watery figure. She approaches nervously. With gods you might not trust, it's best to be respectfully casual.

She does not greet Atlanth directly, but goes to a nearby shelf and starts looking at the titles. *"Let's see, there must be something on Nalaran history somewhere,"* she says aloud.

This gains Atlanth's interest. *"Would you like to hear where your people came from?"* he asks. Sharing lore is one of his favorite things to do, especially with those who live in the waves.

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1b
items.description:
*"Well, we've always been seahorse riders,"* responds Lyria nonchalantly. While keeping her face towards the god, she starts to quietly step backwards, to the end of the first shelf.

*"Seahorses, indeed. But they were not tame at the beginning. There was a year when the seahorses found the settlement and attacked in large numbers with their sharp fins. Your people were forced to hide in trenches."*

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1c
items.description:
*"Sounds awful,"* answers Lyria. *"How did they survive?"* Rounding the first shelf, she thumbs through the books on the second shelf. *It has to be here somewhere,* she thought.

*"A mute fisher's daughter named Selthari noticed what others missed. She felt the vibration of their mating calls and sang their own longing back to them, until they became enchanted with desire."* Atlanth is engrossed in storytelling now and does not notice the books Lyria is looking at.

*"Are you saying the seahorses started going after each other in heat?"* She feigns shock.

*"Each other, no..."* he chucked. *"There's a reason the riders traditionally wore spiked belts."*

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1d
items.description:
Lyria doesn't believe the god's words, although they are amusing. Then, she finds it, a book containing the word "Tethered." She quickly grabs it.

*"That's quite a tale,"* she speaks up, suddenly firm. *"But didn't you know, what I really came for was to hear about the {rebeccapurple|Tethered One}. Won't you tell me about him?"* With that, she leaps up and swims for the exit as fast as she can.

*"What? NOOOO, that's forbidden, you minnow-bitch!"* he roars. But she reaches the door and kicks hard. The entire section cracks and crashes down, preventing him from following.

items.name: Convo Crush 1a
items.description:
Lyria finds Crush taking a break from woodcutting in a quiet spot at the base of a cliff. She often meets him here after coming up the road from the eastern shore. He is a reliable listening ear that she has always found reassuring.

*"So then he was going on about these seahorses and I barely had a chance to grab this book and escape."* Lyria's recap had been rushing out for the past 10 minutes before finally she paused.

*"Wow, I think that might be the craziest story I've ever heard from you,"* responded Crush, *"and that's saying a lot. But hold on, I know plenty about this guy they call the Tethered One. And it's not good news."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1b
items.description:
Lyria looks at him in surprise. *"You know about him?"*

*"Yeah, the Stonereach play a major role in running Blackvein Hold, what with it being underground and all. I've visited a few times myself. Not through the subterranean water, though,"* he laughed. *"Just the front gate.*"

*"Anyway, the guards say they hate being near his cell. He can slip through almost any crack, and for more than a century now, he's been learning {darkgray|Ithilborn} tricks. Guess he has a natural affinity with their ways. If it weren't for the fact that that prison was made by Vull himself, doubtless the Tethered One would be out causing gods know what terror."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1c
items.description:
Lyria ponders this. *"I mean, I'm not saying he comes across as safe, and certainly not warm and friendly like Dulcie,"* (this gets a laugh out of Crush), *"but I don't know, I guess he was convincing enough that I wanted to know what secrets the gods have covered up."*

*"I think you're underestimating him,"* came back Crush. *"Met an unimaginative farmer once who said the Tethered One could pull the spirit right out of a man and stitch it into ships, buildings, even weapons."* His calloused fingers absently traced the woodaxe's edge, as if reassuring himself it bore no enchantments. *"Dunno if it's true, but that farmer? His eyes never blinked right after."*

*"Not to mention what we learned in school history about him allowing the Drowned Court's army to march right up to the celestial realm. They had no choice but to break the Worldbridge or countless lives would have been lost."*

*"That explains how he got tethered to the earthly plane—he was holding open the terrestrial side of the bridge when it was burst. Foolish vanity to go against the gods, and dangerous to boot."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1d
items.description:
*"Well, here is the book. It has a lot of strange characters, but some are in the common language.*" She opens the book.

*"Now, I found a reference to the Drowned Court King, when the entire land was in danger of being taken over by the sea."* Crush shudders. Lyria doesn't have the same gut reaction to the prospect of floods, but still, she understood that such awesome power could be dangerous.

*"Ah yes, and the merrow—my people, who we now call Nalaran—were his army."*

*"Clear as a lantern in a mine,"* returns Crush. *"Just think what would have happened had the gods not stopped them."*

*"But look, I don't think that's the whole story,"* counters Lyria. *"A large group of merrow resisted his plan. They had no interest in wiping out the dry land. Look, this word is ...resisted..., then ...many fled..."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1e
items.description:
*"Let me see that,"* Crush speaks up, his curiosity piqued. **She hands him the book.**

*"Then these refugees were the ones who tried to enter the celestial realm? If that's true, then they were asking for help. And that would mean the Tethered One was trying to prevent their deaths."*

*"Well, that does fit together, but it's just sad history. I don't see why we should get involved."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1f
items.description:
*"You know, you can be really stubborn sometimes,"* retorted Lyria. *"Like, why can't you just go with the flow."*

*"Never mind, I'll do it on my own then."* She leaves to find the Tethered One, entering through the subterranean waters as before.

items.name: Convo Crush 2a
items.description:
Crush watches as Dulcie walks up, feeling uncomfortably emotional. *"Heya, Dulc, how've you been?"* he hesitates.

*"Don't give me that, I know you've been avoiding me. Now, this lass here says she needs your help to save the world. But you won't lift a finger?"*

*"Now, see, Dulcie, you can be so unreasonable. The thing is, this guy, he's not one you'd bring to the tavern to hang out with. He's—"

*"So that's your reason for not helping her? I don't believe it. Do you think she's right or not?"*

*"Well—"*

items.name: Convo Crush 2b
items.description:
Dulcie turns to Lydia. *"He'll help,"* she finishes.

{lemonchiffon|Edit **Crush** and *Show in Overview*}

*"Um, well okay then,"* she says, hearing no argument from Crush. *"Now, we need 30 Spectrum Bars."*

*"There is a way to get those, but it's not easy. I'd need the **Harmony Pick.** **Thaddeus** has it, but he's not going to let anyone borrow it. He's even more stubborn than I am."*

*"Thaddeus, huh? I was just spilling a drink on him a few minutes ago in the tavern. Not my favorite customer. But whatever, wait here, I'll get your blasted pick."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 1a
items.description:
After the long trip north, Lyria enters Pike Village and sees the man she recognizes. *"Hello, remember me?"* she asks.

*"Why, Lyria, good to see you again!"* exclaims Danglars warmly, walking up to her and hugging her. *"What brings you here this time? Some kind of expedition no doubt."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 1b
items.description:
Lyria is a bit surprised at the sudden warmth, then remembers that {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} are often like that. And looking around at the inviting houses countering harsh conditions, it's not hard to understand why. She leans into his embrace for a moment before stepping back.

*"Well, yes, as a matter of fact, I am trying to find something. I don't suppose you've heard of a sunken library? Like, under the ocean somewhere."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 1c
items.description:
*"Hmm, let me think,"* says Danglars. *"So, there are some timbers from a shipwreck to the northeast that we could investigate. But you'd have a hard time making it through the deep snow. Would you like to ride with me on a sled?"*

*"That sounds lovely!"* responds Lyria eagerly.

items.name: Convo Dulcie 1a
items.description:
Lyria washes into the tavern. She spots Dulcie handing a drink to a patron, who responds by slapping her on the butt. Dulcie frowns and walks away.

*"Hey Dulcie, could we talk?"* calls Lyria.

*"Sure, I need a break from this place anyway,"* she says sourly. They step out to the front of the tavern.

items.name: Convo Dulcie 1b
items.description:
Outside, Lyria asks, *"Dulcie, how do you feel about mending the broken world?"*

*"I'm glad there are people like you, dear, who are worried about that sort of thing,"* is Dulcie's reply.

*"Okay, well, I need your help with Crush, he's being obstinate. Can you persuade him to help me?"*

*"Crush, huh? Well, the two of us had something going for quite a long time, you know. I was happy then. How's that fellow of yours anyway, Sutherdepth was it?"*

*"Swirly's been working on the pipes as always. And he's not exactly **my** fellow. I'm not sure if I can be with someone who never swam beyond the eastern coral reef. But anyway, Crush is just over there, by the cliff.*"

{lemonchiffon|Edit **Dulcie** and mark *Show in Overview.*}

items.name: Convo Kormak 1a
items.description:
Lyria's not too keen on prolonged incarceration, but she might just kill Kormak instead. She pulls him under, threatening.

He gasps for air, offering information in exchange for his life. She agrees, listening.

items.name: Convo Kormak 1b
items.description:
Kormak tells Lyria about the **Tethered One**, who he had heard was in cell block D of **Blackvein Hold**.

After the conversation, Lyria lets him go, sensing that he's not particularly villainous. He scrambles to the bank and leaves quickly. (Set **Kormak's** location to *Inactive*)

items.name: Convo TethOne 1a
items.description:
Lyria peers into the cell. She sees a man seated on a dirty mattress without sheets. Noticing the movement in the window, he looks up. *"How did you get here?"* he asks.

*"I dove through the underground waterways,"* she answered. *"I hear you're a special prisoner. Is there a reason I should help you?"*

items.name: Convo TethOne 1b
items.description:
*"I have been wrongfully imprisoned,"* he began. *"Those in power have put me here to preserve their control. But it has made the world broken. If you help me, perhaps we can mend it."*

Lyria might be willing to help a prisoner in need if she can trust him or know what he's about. *"Why should I trust you? After all, you don't have the look of an innocent; rather the opposite."* She suddenly notices the purple glow from deep within his eyes.

items.name: Convo TethOne 1c
items.description:
The Tethered One responds, *"There's a book that reveals my history. However, the gods have hidden it, I believe somewhere under water. Perhaps you could find it?"*

Lyria huffs, *"Well, there is a lot of water in the world. But I do know of someone who has spent years mapping oceans and lakes, a {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} by the name of **Danglars**, from **Pike Village.**. Perhaps he could help."*

items.name: Convo TethOne 2a
items.description:
Lyria returns to the cell. *"Okay, I found that book of yours. Flying porpoises, was the sea god angry. Anyway, I am on your side. How can I help?"*

The Tethered One answers, *"I'm going to need two things. First, a weapon. Second, a way out."*

*"For the weapon, we'll need **30 Spectrum Bars,**"* he continued. *"As for the way out, I have a plan involving water, a lot of it, but we can talk about that later."*

items.name: Convo TethOne 2b
items.description:
*"Now, this Crush you mentioned, I've heard of him. We should get him to join us, for the mining and generally being reliable."*

*"I tried,"* Lyria responded, *"but he's stubborn. I'll need backup. I know of a tavern woman in Dustridge Inn, Dulcie, who can help."*

*"A Jovial? Such people are useless for causes like ours. I respect your people much more, the Nalaran."*

*"Well, I'm going to talk to her anyway,"* replied Lyria and left.

items.name: Convo Thaddeus 1a
items.description:
Thaddeus had been ogling Dulcie's backside as she left, and now he sees her coming back in. *"Get over here,"* he demands. *"I'd like to discuss where you're going to be sleeping tonight."*

*"What would your wife say?"* answers Dulcie calmly. *"Honestly, I feel sorry for Bliss sometimes."*

*"Now, don't pretend to be all coy with me,"* shouts Thaddeus above the tavern din. *"It wouldn't be the first time I've taken you."*

*"And I don't plan to make a habit of it. Anyway, Darla is available if you're in need of paid company."*

items.name: Convo Thaddeus 1b
items.description:
*"Darla, huh? I mean, she's not bad, but I haven't had you in a long time."* Thaddeus has had a lot to drink, more than usual, and grows wild. He grabs Dulcie and throws her to the ground, then starts to climb on top of her.

The owner, Hink, rushes out from behind the bar. *"Thaddeus, what the hell, this is not acceptable,"* he yells, pulling the larger man up by his shoulders. Thaddeus spins and knocks Hink down without thinking.

Hink slowly gets up, staring angrily into Thaddeus's face without saying anything.

Thaddeus looks around, and the tavern has gone silent. *"Look, I may have gotten out of line here,"* he softens. He extends a hand to help Dulcie up off of the floor.

items.name: Convo Thaddeus 1c
items.description:
Hink looks to Dulcie. *"What this man has done today is unacceptable. How do you want to handle this?"*

Dulcie hold back a sniffle and steadies herself to face Thaddeus. *"I'm willing to forget this incident, but I need something from you. We need to borrow the Harmony Pick."*

Thaddeus stiffens. *"The Harmony... now why would you want a thing like that?"* he asks suspiciously.

*"Never you mind, and I personally guarantee we'll return it as soon as we're finished,"* she promises.

*"I'll hold you to that,"* he says threateningly, but reluctantly **gives her the pick.**

items.name: Flint Knife
items.description: Useful for cutting crafted materials

items.name: Forbidden Book
items.description:
Atlanth won't let you leave with this unless he's distracted. Talk to him.

After escaping from the Sunken Library, Lyria should give the book to her friend **Crush** in **Dustridge Town.**

items.name: Harmony Pick
items.description: Can mine spectrum ore.

items.name: Iron Dagger
items.description: Piercing dmg

items.name: Needle
items.description: Sharp fragile blade made of **Spectrum Bars**. Stitch an earthly soul to the steel.

items.name: Pointed Stick
items.description: Piercing damage, can reach up to 1 tile away, could also be thrown.

items.name: Refractive Stealth Cloak
items.description: Made from **Shadow Silk**. Equip to *Back* slot.

items.name: Shadow Silk
items.description: Made from **Spectrum Bars**

items.name: Spectrum Forge
items.description:
No one knows who built it, but this forge was uncovered in a deep chamber below the spectrum ore source. It runs on geothermal heat and requires no fuel.

This is the only place to smelt spectrum ore, but the bars can be used elsewhere.

items.name: Steel Bar
items.description: To make steel, coal is required to combine with iron as well as fuel the forge.

items.name: Sunken Library Map
items.description: Scribbled notes of underwater landmarks and a dotted line pointing to the circled word "Library."

items.name: Unarmed
items.description:
Punch, kick, bite, whatever you can do, although it's not going to do a whole lot usually. 

For events, add this to a character's inventory first.

items.name: Wooden Club
items.description: Blunt dmg

locations.name: BH Cell D2
locations.description: Barred window that looks out into a small cave ceiling over water.

locations.name: BH Cell D2 Window
locations.description: Going to the surface here shows a small, low cavern with only a few feet between the water and the cave ceiling. The bars of a small cell window are east, allowing conversation with whoever is inside.

locations.name: Blackvein Gate
locations.description: The guards determine who to let in and out. After hearing that a Nalaran woman helped free **Kormak**, they'll interrogate **Lyria** if she approaches.

locations.name: Blackvein Hold Approach
locations.description: Looking down from the crest of a hill, you can see the **Blackvein Hold** gate ahead.

locations.name: Deep Rocky Pool — Below Surface
locations.description: Above, light rays penetrate from the surface. To the west, the water goes underground.

locations.name: Deep Rocky Pool — Surface
locations.description: Near Blackvein Hold, off of the main road. Trees at the water's edge available for crafting, to prepare for whatever lies in the depths.

locations.name: Deep Rocky Pool — Underground
locations.description: It's very dark here, making it difficult to detect threats. A quickly moving target could avoid attacks of opportunity by carefully kiting, as long as they don't fumble attacks.

locations.name: Desert
locations.description: Impractical to traverse except for the Firebranded.

locations.name: Dustridge Tavern
locations.description: Cozy, dimly lit tavern with a roaring fireplace.

locations.name: Dustridge Town
locations.description: Busy working class community. The most important local industry is mining.

locations.name: East Harbor
locations.description: A major road goes through here, and there is a dock for freight ships. The ocean expands to the horizon in the east. Southwest is the town of **Dustridge**, while to the north lie the cold lands.

locations.name: Forge Chamber
locations.description: In the middle of the chamber, the forge connects from ceiling to floor like a pillar.

locations.name: Grove
locations.description: Frequented by Dustridge workers for harvesting wood.

locations.name: Jungle
locations.description: Home of many Treemates.

locations.name: Murky Pond
locations.description: On a hot afternoon, Lyria decides to cool off with a swim. She doesn't really mind the algae — the scum slips off of her dress.

locations.name: Narrow Glade
locations.description:
A day's journey southeast of **Blackvein Hold.**

Guards are starting the long march back with their prisoners, worried they're too far away.  Looking at the pond, **Kormak** considers that if he could free his hands, this might be a chance to escape by swimming. Suddenly, he notices a creature in green briefly popping above the pond surface before re-emerging. Curious, he looks carefully and discovers it's a young woman.

locations.name: Pike Village
locations.description: By an inland lake known for ice fishing, not far from the ocean. Some houses are dug from snow or built with ice blocks.

locations.name: Sled Trail
locations.description:
It would be slow walking on this trail and impossible with wheels. Snow covered pine hills surround the area, for a quietly beautiful combination of dark green and white.

Move **Danglars** with Lyria.

locations.name: Snow Cave
locations.description: Dense snowy walls make it so sound does not travel outside even if someone were to walk nearby.

locations.name: Stalactite Room
locations.description: The only source of spectrum ore ever found is in this cave, the luminescent stalactites that grow from the ceiling. Swarms of bats fly in and out of them.

locations.name: Sunken Library
locations.description: Dome-shaped building on the ocean floor with a doorway at the top.

locations.name: Vuldelf
locations.description: Ancient cavern deep underground.

locations.name: Washed Up Timbers
locations.description: Years ago, part of a wrecked ship washed ashore. Care must be taken to walk among the rotting timbers.

locations.name: Western End
locations.description: Sparsely populated -- horse nomad people comfortable in the thin dusty air.

locations.name: Western Road
locations.description: Goes from Dustridge in the east, through the plains, and to the western jungle.

characters.name: Atlanth Tiderender
characters.description: Sea deity, keeper of drowned truths

characters.name: Chain Gang Guard 1
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {orange|Firebranded}, quarrelsome
- **Specialties:** melee mage, incompetent at watching yet suspicious
- **Appearance:** dark skin good for intense sunny climates

characters.name: Chain Gang Guard 2
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {pink|Jovial}, unmotivated but not easily intimidated or panicked
- **Specialties:** fighter, resistant to blunt force, slightly more incompetent than his fellow guard
- **Appearance:** large and fat

He is the primary cause of the delay, having said shortly before the opening scene: "Hey, don't worry, we'll have plenty of time to finish the card game and still get back before nightfall." Holding ropes that bind **Kormak**.

characters.name: Crush
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {peru|Stonereach}, taciturn, can shape stone, from Dustridge
- **Specialties:** lumberjack, axe proficency, boxing skill
- **Appearance:** thick and sturdy, dark gray skin

characters.name: Danglars
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended}, reserved, inviting
- **Specialties:** seal hunter, ice hook proficiency
- **Appearance:** fur clothing, bonelike skin not susceptible to frostbite, does not sweat

characters.name: Daphnia
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {peru|Stonereach}
- **Specialties:** milk maid, family owns livestock

characters.name: Darla
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {pink|Jovial}
- **Specialties:** tavern prostitute

characters.name: Dulcie
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {pink|Jovial}, charismatic
- **Specialties:** brings drinks and entertains tavern goers, usually men, not paid to be a prostitute although her job has at times led to sleeping with patrons
- **Appearance:** age 30, soft and curvy build, light chocolate skin, low-cut bodice, messy layered colorful skirts

characters.name: Evelyn
Galebane
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {LemonChiffon|Aetherian}, aloof
- **Specialties:** sorcerer, prison life skills instructor ostensibly to integrate into society

Enjoys tormenting prisoners. Knowledge of the occult used to summon **Suhkh** through hell plane.

characters.name: Kormak
Lorcan
Lyria
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {blue|Nalaran}, water affinity
- **Specialties:** huntress, spear proficiency, young and brave explorer
- **Appearance:** soft coral colored skin, slightly webbed fingers, popup fin flaps, lovely thin figure, tight dark green kelp-hide dress (sturdy leather), luminescent freckles across her nose and shoulders

characters.name: Sky Pirate 1
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {LemonChiffon|Aetherian}, wings to prevent injury from falling and facilitate jumps
- **Specialties:** scimitar proficiency

characters.name: Sled
characters.description: Seats two under heavy blankets for an intimate ride. Pulled by wolves, which only the {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} have undertaken to make use of. Keep your hands away from their teeth!

characters.name: Subterranean Shark
characters.description:
A bit slow and obvious, but strong teeth when adjacent. Good sense of smell to detect prey.

There was once a {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} prisoner who spent 12 years in cell block D, working every day on the rock with a chisel until he had managed a 10 ft long passage. At the end, he found water, and dove in. Now, whether he would have had enough air to make it to the surface is unlikely, but we'll never know for sure, because this shark made a happy meal out of him.

characters.name: Suhkh
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {purple|Demon} (minor), succubus
- **Specialties:** derives power from enticing and tormenting
- **Appearance:** not visible in earthly plane, when seen in hell: orange pupils, blackened rotting bare flesh, whip-like tail, bodily fluids dripping, sulfur smell

characters.name: Sutherdepth
Tethered One
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** not earthly, possibly celestial or demon
- **Specialties:** partial existence in both spiritual and physical plane, dagger/knives proficiency, rogue, can slip through cracks, reportedly can stitch souls onto physical surfaces
- **Appearance:** extroardinarily thin, {rebeccapurple|purple glow} rather than irises comes from within eye sockets, long smooth dark pants and shirt, pale face, slick hair

characters.name: Thaddeus
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {peru|Stonereach}
- **Specialties:** wealthy mining foreman, somewhat of a bully

characters.name: Vull
characters.description:
- god of molten rock, forges
- passively upholds seal of Blackvein Hold
- teamed up with Sunderforge to build the bridge in the depths of time

events.name: Burning Bundle
events.description:
- Held, not thrown (melee range)
- Requires a turn to light before using
- Requires kindling such as branches, or cloth fabric could do the job in a pinch

events.name: Death's Door
events.description: HP reduced to 0 puts main characters in a state of unconsciousness, where they have 3 turns to try to revive, unless they're healed by someone else.

events.name: Water Bolt
events.description:
- As used by the Nalaran, needs water — natural rather than studied magic
- Guaranteed success if water is available, variable damage (cantrip)
- Blunt force dmg, knockback
- Almost no dmg against enemies in water although the current pushes them back

events.name: Weapon Dmg
events.description: If to-hit succeeds then roll to determine dmg.

events.name: Weapon To-Hit
events.description: Attempt to land a physical blow, either melee or ranged depending on the weapon. Could also be unarmed.
